commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs contributor proof plus maintainer/contributor updates for the security-validation and release-owned changelog blockers; do not queue automated repair while real behavior proof is missing.; Needs attention: the diff changes close automation and leaves a PR-only close reason valid when the security review status is not_applicable.; Review finding: [P2] Require cleared security review for product-direction... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-off `unconfirmed_product_direction` close reason with apply-time live-signal gates, workflow env wiring, docs, schema/profile/prompt updates, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a policy feature PR, not a current-main bug report. Source review and the linked issue establish the intended automation behavior rather than a runtime reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor proof plus maintainer/contributor updates for the security-validation and release-owned changelog blockers; do not queue automated repair while real behavior proof is missing.

target.title: feat(policy): gate product-direction PR closes
target.body:
## Summary

- add a distinct `unconfirmed_product_direction` review outcome for technically correct, well-proven external feature PRs without maintainer-confirmed direction
- keep actual closure behind `CLAWSWEEPER_UNCONFIRMED_PRODUCT_DIRECTION_CLOSE_ENABLED`, defaulting to false
- fail closed on age, inactivity, assignment, requested review, maintainer comments/reviews, protected automation labels, state drift, or GitHub fetch failures
- keep paired issue/PR closure from bypassing the policy gate

## Decision

Landing this PR enables durable closure proposals and review comments. It does **not** enable automatic closure. A separate repository-variable decision is required before apply can close any matching PR.

The policy deliberately exempts `clawsweeper:human-review`, `clawsweeper:manual-only`, `clawsweeper:autofix`, and `clawsweeper:automerge`.

No merge behavior changes. Automatically generated PRs remain manual-merge only.

## Validation

- `pnpm run check`
- autoreview: clean after fixing paired-close preflight

Closes https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/218
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
